outfit_info.outfit_description: A charming and eclectic ensemble features a cream sporty dress layered over blue floral shorts, topped by a cozy faux shearling vest. A leopard print belt cinches the waist, adding a bold accent. Black combat boots complete this playful yet edgy look, perfect for a stylish and comfortable outing.

model_attributes.body: A young, slender child with a bright, confident demeanor, showcasing the outfit with a vibrant presence.
model_attributes.pose: Standing confidently with hands on hips, displaying a wide, engaging smile directly at the viewer.
model_attributes.background: A fantastical 'Interstellar Rodeo' arena setting, featuring a cosmic sky and quirky alien audience figures.

styling_techniques.P01055218: peeking out from under dress hem
